CustomField.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary fields in this record (Base_Price, Price_Per_Extra_Km, Minimum_Price). Used at Step 10 for currency conversion if different from the Opportunity's currency. Resolution logic: if this field is populated → use it; otherwise fall back to Country_Currency__mdt.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ISO currency code (e.g., EUR, GBP, DKK). Specifies the currency of all prices in this record.
CustomField.label: Currency Code
